title: Digest
description: Protocol-owned digest reference family. MVP shared content-addressed references pin sha256 and fail closed for unknown algorithms.

digestValue.description: Reusable digest fragment for content-addressed protocol references.

hash_alg.description: Hash algorithm identifier for shared protocol digests. MVP pins this to sha256.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for digest objects.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this digest object.

hash_alg.description: Hash algorithm identifier for this digest object.

hash.description: Lowercase hexadecimal digest value for the referenced content.
